arts.sum: Reds captain Van Dijk entered 2025 as one of three Liverpool stars at risk of departing the club for nothing at the end of the campaign alongside Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold .

arts.sum: The last Liverpool player to lift the Ballon d'Or was Michael Owen in 2001 - but Brazil icon Pele believed another ex-star could've lifted the award.

arts.ttl: Salah says Liverpool ‘owe the fans’ another Premier League title
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has said Liverpool ‘owe the fans’ another Premier League crown after edging closer to the title with a 2-1 win over West Ham. Goals from Luis Diaz and Virgil van Dijk secured three important points at Anfield and a win that moves Arne Slot’s side 13 points clear at the top. arts.sum: Liverpool went one step closer to winning the Premier League after a 2-1 win against West Ham earlier today. The Reds went into the game with a chance to extend their lead to 13 points after Arsenal’s draw against Brentford on Saturday.
